title: Wisdom of the Wind

sections.label: Lyrics
lines: Wisdom of Wind
A whisper on the wind, a kingdom in my hand
The weight of seven seas, the wisdom of the sand
Each riddle solved, each treasure known, a tapestry of might
A throne of ivory, bathed in golden light
They came from dust and distant shores,
to hear the words I’d speak
Believing in the answers that a mortal tongue could seek
Building slightly, drums enter softly, reverb-heavy)
And for a time, the world felt like a song I understood
Every note in harmony, every stone a precious good
My heart, a listening chamber, for the secrets whispered low
But even oceans deep can’t fill the space where spirits grow
Beyond the shimmer, past the gleam, a truth begins to rise
More than the power, more than
the dream, reflected in our eyes
This fleeting wonder, rich and vast, a shadow and a sign
The echo of a love that lasts, a truly grand design!
I walked through gardens, gold-paved ways,
with pleasure as my guide
Drank deep from every fleeting joy,
with nothing left to hide
The laughter of a thousand feasts, the sparkle of the vine
Yet in the quiet after, a different hunger, mine.
For every tower built so tall, and every gem so bright
Could never match the simple grace of dawn dispelling night.
Building again, layered harmonies start to weave in)
And in that chase, the world felt like a race I couldn't win
Collecting moments, fleeting fast,
where does the soul begin?
My heart, a restless wanderer,
through all that glitters bold
Searching for a story that could
never quite be told... by gold.
Beyond the shimmer, past the gleam, a truth begins to rise
More than the power, more than
the dream, reflected in our eyes
This fleeting wonder, rich and vast, a shadow and a sign
The echo of a love that lasts, a truly grand design!
Like chasing wind, these earthly crowns,
they fade like fading stars
But in the broken, open ground, is where the healing starts.
A whisper turns into a roar, a flicker to a flame,
The richest treasure to explore is calling out your name!
Not in the castles built on sand,
but in the heart that’s free,
To reach for an eternal hand, for all eternity!
Fullest and most anthemic,
everyone singing, ad-libs, massive reverb)
Beyond the shimmer, past the gleam, a truth begins to rise
More than the power, more than
the dream, reflected in our eyes
This fleeting wonder, rich and vast, a shadow and a sign
The echo of a love that lasts, a truly grand design!
A grand design...
Echoes... in eternity...
More than gold...
It’s more than gold...

epigraph: And I gave my heart to know wisdom
styleNote: Drums Enter Softly · Full Singalong Moment · Fullest And Most Anthemic
